name: Pasta with Uncooked Tomato, Basil and Mozzarella Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds ripe tomatoes (about 3), seeded and chopped
1/2 cup packed fresh basil leaves, chopped coarse
1/2 pound fresh or processed mozzarella, diced
salt and freshly ground black pepper
1 pound dried shaped pasta of choice (e.g., penne, farfelle, rigatoni)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the tomatoes, garlic, basil, mozzarella, olive oil, vinegar, salt, and pepper to taste.
2. Let the sauce stand, covered at room temperature for at least 1 hour and up to 4 hours.
3. Just before serving, bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook the pasta until it is al dente, then drain well.
4. Add the cooked pasta to the sauce and toss well.
5. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if needed.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
